title: argyranthemum canariense
intro: Argyranthemum canariense, also known as the Canary Island daisy, is a flowering plant native to the Canary Islands, characterized by its white or pink flowers and grayish-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Argyranthemum canariense include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with medications and allergies.
